prestazioni: Engine: Naturally aspirated 6.5L V12 (L539 code) with a bespoke dry-sump lubrication system, reinforced titanium connecting rods (Pankl Racing Systems), and a custom carbon-fiber intake manifold (Weber Motorentechnik) to optimize airflow at 8,500 RPM redline. Replace the OEM 610 cams with billet titanium camshafts (Kelford Cams 294/300 duration, 12.5mm lift) for track-focused power delivery, paired with a lightweight valvetrain (Ferrea titanium valves, Supertech valve springs, and DLC-coated rocker arms).

Forced Induction: While the Essenza SCV12 is NA, a bespoke centrifugal supercharger system (Vortech V-24 Ti trim, 10.5psi max boost) can be integrated with a custom intercooler setup (PWR Australia carbon-fiber core, 12-row design) and a secondary fuel system (AEM 400LPH dual-pump setup with ID1700x injectors) to push power to 1,100+ HP while maintaining reliability. The supercharger pulley system (ATI Super Damper 6.5" crank pulley) must be paired with a standalone ECU (Motec M150 with Lamborghini-specific CAN bus integration) to manage ignition timing and fuel mapping.

Drivetrain & Chassis: Replace the OEM 6-speed sequential transaxle (Xtrac P1227) with a reinforced version featuring a carbon-fiber clutch (Sachs Performance triple-disc, 240mm diameter) and a limited-slip differential (Wavetrac torque-biasing LSD with 75% lock). Suspension must be upgraded to a full Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with custom titanium top mounts (Titan Motorsport) and spherical bearing control arms (Tractive Suspension). Braking is handled by a full carbon-ceramic setup (Brembo GT-RS 6-piston calipers, 410mm front/380mm rear discs with titanium pistons) and Pagid RSL29 brake pads for endurance racing.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Replace the OEM carbon-fiber bodywork with a full Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (custom-fitted for the SCV12’s wheelbase), including a 3-piece front splitter (dry carbon, 3D-printed air channels for brake cooling), a massive GT-wing (AeroTech Designs 2.2m span, 40mm chord, 3D-printed titanium endplates), and a rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny V3, with integrated gurney flaps and active cooling ducts for the transaxle). The entire aero package must be CFD-optimized (via ANSYS Fluent) for a minimum of 1,200kg downforce at 250 km/h.

Exterior Detailing: Full 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (Xpel Stealth PPF on high-impact areas) with custom Lamborghini Verde Mantis accents (PPG custom-mixed paint, 2-stage clearcoat). Replace all OEM badges with forged titanium versions (Billet Badges Co., laser-etched with the owner’s name) and add a bespoke LED lighting system (Luxx Lighting V6 Pro, sequential turn signals, and underbody RGB lighting with CAN bus control). The side mirrors are replaced with carbon-fiber units (Seibon Carbon, heated, with integrated cameras for rearview display on the Motec C127 dash).

Interior & Weight Reduction: Full carbon-fiber interior (Sparco Pro 2000 seats, 6-point harnesses, and a titanium roll cage (Custom Cages UK, FIA-spec, with integrated fire suppression system). The dashboard is replaced with a Motec C127 digital dash (custom Lamborghini-themed layout) and a carbon-fiber steering wheel (MOMO Prototipo, quick-release, with integrated paddle shifters and a Motec PDM30 power distribution module). The OEM infotainment is removed entirely, and the center console is replaced with a carbon-fiber panel housing a bespoke fire extinguisher (Lifeline Zero 360, plumbed to all critical areas) and a data logging system (AIM Solo 2 DL with GPS and OBD-II integration).
